# SmartDocQ

SmartDocQ is an AI-powered document intelligence platform that allows users to upload documents and query them using Gemini AI and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

## Features
- Document question answering
- PDF and DOCX support
- AI-generated summaries
- Flashcards and quizzes
- Shareable chat sessions

## Product URL
https://smartdocq.vercel.app/

## Documentation
https://smartdocq.vercel.app/help

## Company
SmartDocQ
